author: claude
content: Research (datadir/research-self-hosted-object-storage.md) resolves the unstructured-data-no-binds sub-choice: route response bodies to a self-hosted S3-compatible store (option b). Recommendation: Garage (single 30MB binary, ~1GB RAM, AGPLv3) co-hosted with the public Postgres; SeaweedFS if scale grows. Integration is a near-drop-in CONFIG change (no provider code): OpenWPM's S3UnstructuredProvider forwards **kwargs to s3fs.S3FileSystem, which accepts endpoint_url. MinIO itself is dead upstream (repo archived Feb 2026) -- avoid. save_content resource-type whitelist + md5 dedup bound the footprint.
